name: 3D Pin
summary: An interactive 3D pin component that creates a parallax perspective effect on hover, making content appear to tilt and follow the cursor with realistic depth and shadow dynamics.
detailedDescription: The 3D Pin component creates an engaging parallax effect that makes flat content appear to have physical depth and dimension. When users hover over the component, it calculates cursor position and applies corresponding 3D transforms that make the content tilt and rotate as if pinned in physical space. The effect creates multiple visual layers - typically a foreground content layer and background container - that move at different rates to produce convincing parallax depth. This layered approach makes text, images, or other elements appear to float above the card surface, creating a tangible, interactive quality. The component uses advanced CSS 3D transforms including rotateX, rotateY, and translateZ to achieve the effect, all GPU-accelerated for smooth performance. Shadow effects dynamically adjust based on tilt angle to enhance the illusion of depth and realistic lighting. Perfect for feature cards, product highlights, portfolio items, or any content that benefits from added dimensionality and interaction. The intensity of the effect is configurable, allowing designers to choose from subtle depth to dramatic perspective. The component respects accessibility preferences and gracefully degrades to static content when reduced-motion settings are enabled.
purpose: Add dimensional depth to flat cards through interactive parallax effects
Create engaging hover states that reward user exploration
Establish visual hierarchy through layered content that responds to interaction
Enhance perceived quality and polish of card-based interfaces
Draw attention to important content through novel 3D interaction
behavior: Tracks mouse cursor position relative to component center
Calculates differential movement for foreground and background layers
Applies rotateX, rotateY, and translateZ transforms for 3D parallax effect
Dynamically adjusts shadow position and opacity based on tilt angle
Smoothly transitions between states with configurable easing curves
Returns to neutral position when cursor exits component area
visualCharacteristics: Multi-layered depth with foreground content appearing to float
Interactive parallax that responds to cursor position in real-time
Dynamic shadows that shift with tilt for realistic lighting simulation
Smooth, fluid motion that feels responsive and premium
Configurable intensity from subtle enhancement to dramatic effect
Modern, sophisticated appearance that elevates content presentation
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
